title: Naruto (Vol. 1)
author: Masashi Kishimoto
summary: Follows the early steps of Naruto Uzumaki, an orphan ninja containing a sealed demon fox, who seeks recognition to become the village Hokage.

title: One Piece (Vol. 1)
author: Eiichiro Oda
summary: Monkey D. Luffy eats a devil fruit and sets out to gather a crew and find the legendary treasure to become King of the Pirates.

title: Attack on Titan (Vol. 1)
author: Hajime Isayama
summary: Humans live inside massive walled cities to protect themselves from gigantic humanoid man-eating monsters called Titans.

title: Demon Slayer (Vol. 1)
author: Koyoharu Gotouge
summary: Tanjiro Kamado sets out to become a demon slayer to cure his sister Nezuko, who has been turned into a demon.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen (Vol. 1)
author: Gege Akutami
summary: High schooler Yuji Itadori swallows a cursed finger to save his friends, becoming host to the King of Curses, Ryomen Sukuna.

title: Death Note (Vol. 1)
author: Tsugumi Ohba & Takeshi Obata
summary: A brilliant high school student discovers a supernatural notebook that allows him to kill anyone by writing their name in it.

title: Chainsaw Man (Vol. 1)
author: Tatsuki Fujimoto
summary: Denji, a destitute young man, makes a contract with a chainsaw dog demon and becomes a hybrid devil hunter.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist (Vol. 1)
author: Hiromu Arakawa
summary: Two brothers search for the Philosopher's Stone to restore their bodies after a failed attempt to bring their mother back to life.

title: My Hero Academia (Vol. 1)
author: Kohei Horikoshi
summary: In a world where almost everyone has powers, a powerless boy is gifted a quirk by the world's greatest hero.

title: All the Young Dudes
author: MsKingBean89
summary: A massive, widely acclaimed chronicle of Remus Lupin's years at Hogwarts and the first wizarding war.

title: Manacled
author: SenLinYu
summary: A dark, complex post-war alternate universe centering on Hermione Granger and Draco Malfoy in a dystopian wizarding world.

title: Isolation
author: Bexchan
summary: Hermione Granger and Draco Malfoy are confined together in a small dormitory for protection during their final year.

title: Twist and Shout
author: Gabriel & Keira Marcos
summary: A poignant, legendary 1960s alternate history romance following Dean Winchester and Castiel amidst the Vietnam War era.

title: Passerine
author: thnk_u_nxt
summary: A beautifully written, emotional fantasy epic about immortal brothers, royalty, and tragic destiny.

title: Concepts of Physics (Vol. 1)
author: H.C. Verma
summary: The gold standard book for Indian engineering aspirants, focusing on solid concept building and numerical exercises.

title: Fundamentals of Physics
author: Halliday, Resnick & Walker
summary: A comprehensive textbook explaining mechanics, thermodynamics, and electromagnetism with rigorous conceptual clarity.

title: Organic Chemistry
author: Morrison & Boyd
summary: A legendary textbook widely used for studying carbon compounds, mechanisms, and chemical reactions.

title: Higher Engineering Mathematics
author: B.S. Grewal
summary: A complete mathematical resource covering calculus, differential equations, algebra, and statistics for engineers.

title: Indian Art and Culture
author: Nitin Singhania
summary: An exhaustive guide detailing the visual arts, performing arts, and literary heritage of India for competitive exams.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
summary: Hawking demystifies black holes, general relativity, quantum mechanics, and the origins of the universe for general readers.

title: Cosmos
author: Carl Sagan
summary: Sagan explores 15 billion years of cosmic evolution, tracking the rise of science, civilizations, and our place in the universe.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
summary: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship that teaches how to write, read, and refactor beautiful code.

title: Wings of Fire
author: A.P.J. Abdul Kalam
summary: The inspiring life story of India's 'Missile Man' and former President, tracing his humble beginnings to leading space programs.

title: Steve Jobs
author: Walter Isaacson
summary: The definitive biography of Apple's co-founder, based on hundreds of interviews, detailing his creative genius and intense drive.

title: The Diary of a Young Girl
author: Anne Frank
summary: The poignant, world-famous diary of a teenage Jewish girl writing while hiding from the Nazis in occupied Amsterdam.

title: Long Walk to Freedom
author: Nelson Mandela
summary: The autobiography of the South African president, describing his youth, anti-apartheid struggle, and 27 years in prison.

title: Becoming
author: Michelle Obama
summary: An intimate, powerful, and inspiring memoir by the former First Lady of the United States, charting her personal journey.

title: Elon Musk
author: Ashlee Vance
summary: An inside look into the life and ventures of the billionaire entrepreneur behind SpaceX, Tesla, and SolarCity.

title: Playing It My Way
author: Sachin Tendulkar
summary: The legendary Indian cricketer shares his journey from a young boy playing in Mumbai to becoming a global icon of the game.

title: The Story of My Experiments with Truth
author: Mahatma Gandhi
summary: Gandhi's candid account of his moral, spiritual, and political experiments, forming the basis of his non-violent struggle.

title: Shoe Dog
author: Phil Knight
summary: A fascinating memoir by the creator of Nike, detailing the early struggles, chaotic partnerships, and ultimate rise of the brand.

title: The C++ Programming Language
author: Bjarne Stroustrup
summary: The definitive guide to writing C++ programs, written by the creator of the language himself.

title: Love in the Time of Zombies
author: Z-Writer
summary: A creative post-apocalyptic romance highlighting human survival, community building, and unexpected love.

title: Icarus
author: Anonymous
summary: A beautifully tragic mythological retelling set in a modern collegiate backdrop, exploring ambition and downfall.

title: The Student
author: jsthought
summary: A heartwarming, character-focused story focusing on the academic and emotional growth of a transfer student in Tokyo.
